summary: Completed testing of CORtracker features: PDF Export with Logo, CORChat File Attachments, and CORBot drag-and-drop. All backend tests pass (12/12). Frontend UI verified working.

minor.issue: employee@test.com account is deactivated - used demo@employee.com instead

critical_code_review_comments: PDF Logo: create_pdf_header_with_logo() function correctly checks if logo file exists and falls back to text if not found
File Upload: Proper validation for file size (10MB max) and file types (images + documents)
Chat Attachments: Message type correctly set to 'image' or 'file' based on attachment type
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: 1) PDF exports include CORtracker logo in header (verified via PDF content analysis), 2) CORChat file attachments work for both images and documents (upload endpoint + message sending with attachment), 3) CORBot drag-and-drop button visible and functional. CORChat is accessed via floating button in bottom-right corner (not sidebar).

pdf_export_with_logo.details: Both timesheet PDF (/api/export/timesheet/pdf) and performance insights PDF (/api/admin/performance/export-pdf) return valid PDFs with image content (logo)

corchat_file_attachments.details: File upload endpoint (/api/chat/upload) works for images and documents. Messages can be sent with attachments. Paperclip button visible in chat UI.

corbot_drag_and_drop.details: CORBot button visible in bottom-left corner, opens chat panel when clicked, drag functionality implemented with localStorage persistence
